stemHtml: What data are displayed on the Navigation Display (ND) of an EFIS equipped aircraft?

options.a: Intruder alerts, altitude, autopilot active modes, and weather radar.
options.b: A terrain map, navigation aids, bearings, and flight director active modes.
options.c: The flight plan, engine failure, navigation aids, and resolution advisories.
options.d: The flight plan, weather radar, terrain map, and intruder alerts.
